```{r}
    by = "NLF_ID"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    segment_year_data %>%
      group_by(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
      summarise(
        before_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT[period == "before"], na.rm = TRUE),
        after_rate  = mean(crash_rate_MVMT[period == "after"],  na.rm = TRUE),
        change      = after_rate - before_rate,
        .groups     = "drop"
      ),
    by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID"
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(change)) %>%
  distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, PROJECT_NME, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
         COUNTY_CD.x, completion_year, before_rate, after_rate,
         change, EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST, FUNCTION_CLASS_CD,
         ADT_TOTAL_NBR) %>%
  arrange(change)

as.data.frame(new_candidates_3)
```

```{r}


```

```{r}


```

```{r}
############################################
### All Ohio Projects — Trend Per Category
### Centered on event time (t=0 = completion)
############################################

# Build statewide version with all categories
ohio_all_types <- analysis_df %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  inner_join(
    projects_safety %>%
      select(NLF_ID, CTL_BEGIN, CTL_END, completion_year,
             PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST),
    by = "NLF_ID",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    CTL_BEGIN_NBR <= CTL_END.y,
    CTL_END_NBR   >= CTL_BEGIN.y,
    !is.na(completion_year)
  ) %>%
  distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
           completion_year, .keep_all = TRUE)

# Join yearly crash rates and compute event time
ohio_yearly_full <- segment_year_data %>%
  filter(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in%
           ohio_all_types$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
  left_join(
    ohio_all_types %>%
      select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
             completion_year) %>%
      distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
               completion_year),
    by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY),
    !is.na(completion_year.y)        # <-- use .y suffix
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = CRASH_YR - completion_year.y
  ) %>%
  filter(event_time >= -2, event_time <= 2)

# Check coverage
ohio_yearly_full %>%
  group_by(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY) %>%
  summarise(
    n_segments  = n_distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID),
    years_avail = paste(sort(unique(event_time)), collapse = ", "),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_segments)) %>%
  as.data.frame()


############################################
### Ohio Statewide Event Study — All Categories
############################################

# Summarise by category and event time
ohio_event_summary <- ohio_yearly_full %>%
  group_by(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, event_time) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_crash_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
    se             = sd(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_segments     = n_distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID),
    .groups        = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY) %>%
  mutate(
    did_change = mean(avg_crash_rate[event_time >= 0], na.rm = TRUE) -
                 mean(avg_crash_rate[event_time < 0],  na.rm = TRUE),
    direction  = case_when(
      did_change < -0.5 ~ "Improved",
      did_change >  0.5 ~ "Worsened",
      TRUE              ~ "No Change"
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Color by outcome
outcome_colors <- c(
  "Improved"  = COL_GREEN,
  "Worsened"  = COL_RED,
  "No Change" = COL_MUTED
)

# Build one plot per category
ohio_plots <- lapply(
  unique(ohio_event_summary$PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY),
  function(cat) {
    
    cat_data   <- ohio_event_summary %>% 
                    filter(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY == cat)
    direction  <- unique(cat_data$direction)
    seg_color  <- outcome_colors[direction]
    n_segs     <- max(cat_data$n_segments)
    chg        <- round(unique(cat_data$did_change), 2)
    chg_label  <- ifelse(chg < 0,
                         paste0("▼ ", abs(chg), "/MVMT"),
                         paste0("▲ ", abs(chg), "/MVMT"))
    sparse     <- n_segs < 20
    
    ggplot(cat_data,
           aes(x = event_time, y = avg_crash_rate)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = avg_crash_rate - 1.96 * se,
                      ymax = avg_crash_rate + 1.96 * se),
                  fill = seg_color, alpha = 0.15) +
      geom_line(color = seg_color, linewidth = 1.2) +
      geom_point(color = seg_color, size = 3) +
      geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
                 color = COL_ORANGE, linewidth = 0.7) +
      annotate("text", x = 0.1,
               y = max(cat_data$avg_crash_rate +
                         1.96 * cat_data$se, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.97,
               label = "Completion",
               color = COL_ORANGE, hjust = 0, size = 5.0) +
      annotate("label",
               x = -1.9,
               y = max(cat_data$avg_crash_rate +
                         1.96 * cat_data$se, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.6,
               label = paste0(direction, ": ", chg_label,
                              if (sparse) "\n⚠ Low n" else ""),
               fill    = "#1c2128",
               color   = seg_color,
               size    = 2.8,
               label.size     = 0.4,
               label.padding  = unit(0.3, "lines"),
               hjust   = 0) +
      scale_x_continuous(breaks = -2:2,
                         labels = c("-2", "-1", "0\n(Completion)",
                                    "+1", "+2")) +
      labs(
        title    = cat,
        subtitle = paste0("n = ", n_segs,
                          " segments | Ohio Statewide | 95% CI shown"),
        x        = "Years Relative to Project Completion",
        y        = "Avg Crash Rate (per MVMT)"
      ) +
      theme_odot() +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 11))
  }
)

for (p in ohio_plots) { print(p) }
```

```{r}
#####################
### updated fig 6
#####################

# Rebuild fig6 investment gap data with funding % instead of segment %
fc_labels <- c(
  "1" = "FC1: Interstate",
  "2" = "FC2: Freeway",
  "3" = "FC3: Major Arterial",
  "4" = "FC4: Minor Arterial",
  "5" = "FC5: Collector",
  "6" = "FC6: Minor Collector",
  "7" = "FC7: Local"
)

investment_gap_funding <- data.frame(
  FUNCTION_CLASS_CD = c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7),
  pct_funding       = c(22.0, 6.9, 39.5, 19.8, 9.8, 0.6, 1.4),
  crash_rate        = c(11.3, 8.0, 23.7, 25.6, 25.0, 22.6, 36.5),
  pct_fatalities    = c(8.1, 2.3, 19.3, 24.0, 28.5, 4.9, 12.8)
) %>%
  mutate(
    fc_label   = fc_labels[as.character(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD)],
    bubble_size = pct_fatalities
  )

fig6_updated <- ggplot(investment_gap_funding,
       aes(x = pct_funding,
           y = crash_rate,
           size = bubble_size,
           color = factor(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_text(aes(label = fc_label),
            vjust = -1.2, size = 4.0,
            color = "#e6edf3", fontface = "bold") +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 0, xmax = 12,
           ymin = 22, ymax = 40,
           fill = COL_RED, alpha = 0.06) +
  annotate("text", x = 6, y = 39,
           label = "High risk · Low funding",
           color = COL_RED, size = 3, fontface = "italic") +
  annotate("rect", xmin = 25, xmax = 70,
           ymin = 0, ymax = 15,
           fill = COL_BLUE, alpha = 0.06) +
  annotate("text", x = 47, y = 14,
           label = "Low risk · High funding",
           color = COL_BLUE, size = 4, fontface = "italic") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(4, 18),
                        name = "% of Fatalities") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "1" = COL_BLUE, "2" = COL_BLUE,
    "3" = COL_YELLOW, "4" = COL_ORANGE,
    "5" = COL_RED, "6" = COL_RED,
    "7" = COL_RED
  ), guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title    = "Safety Investment Gap by Road Class",
    subtitle = "Bubble size = share of statewide fatalities",
    x        = "% of Total Safety Funding Received",
    y        = "Avg Crash Rate (per MVMT)",
    caption  = "Source: ODOT Construction Projects & Crash Data 2020–2024"
  ) +
  theme_odot()

fig6_updated
```

```{r}
# Convert 2022 crashes to sf and spatial join to segments
crashes_2022_sf <- Crash2022 %>%
  filter(!is.na(ODOT_LATITUDE_NBR), !is.na(ODOT_LONGITUDE_NBR)) %>%
  st_as_sf(coords = c("ODOT_LONGITUDE_NBR", "ODOT_LATITUDE_NBR"),
           crs = 4326) %>%
  st_transform(st_crs(analysis_df))

# Spatial join to nearest segment
crashes_2022_joined <- crashes_2022_sf %>%
  mutate(
    ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID = analysis_df$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID[
      st_nearest_feature(., analysis_df)
    ]
  ) %>%
  st_drop_geometry()

# Aggregate to segment level
crashes_2022_summary <- crashes_2022_joined %>%
  group_by(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    yearly_crashes = n(),
    yearly_fatal   = sum(CRASH_SEVERITY_CD == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    yearly_injury  = sum(CRASH_SEVERITY_CD %in% c(2,3), na.rm = TRUE),
    CRASH_YR       = 2022,
    .groups        = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_df %>%
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR, ADT_TOTAL_NBR),
    by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    MVMT           = ADT_TOTAL_NBR * SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR * 365 / 1e6,
    crash_rate_MVMT = ifelse(MVMT > 0, yearly_crashes / MVMT, NA),
    period         = "transition",
    treated_safety = ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in% 
                       treated_safety_ids$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID,
    completion_year = NA_real_,
    event_time     = NA_real_
  )

cat("2022 segments processed:", nrow(crashes_2022_summary), "\n")
cat("2022 treated segments:", 
    sum(crashes_2022_summary$treated_safety), "\n")

# Add 2022 to segment_year_data
crashes_2022_summary <- crashes_2022_summary %>%
  mutate(
    treated        = ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in% 
                       analysis_df$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID,
    treated_safety = ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in%
                       treated_safety_ids$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID,
    period         = "transition",
    completion_year = NA_real_,
    event_time     = NA_real_
  )

# Stack with existing data
segment_year_data_full <- bind_rows(
  segment_year_data,
  crashes_2022_summary %>%
    select(any_of(names(segment_year_data)))
) %>%
  arrange(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, CRASH_YR)

# Recompute event time for treated segments
segment_year_data_full <- segment_year_data_full %>%
  left_join(
    ohio_all_types %>%
      distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, completion_year) %>%
      rename(comp_year = completion_year),
    by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    event_time = CRASH_YR - comp_year
  )

# Rebuild event study with 2022 included
event_study_full <- segment_year_data_full %>%
  filter(
    treated_safety == TRUE,
    !is.na(event_time),
    event_time >= -2, event_time <= 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(event_time) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_crash_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
    se             = sd(crash_rate_MVMT,   na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_obs          = n(),
    .groups        = "drop"
  )

as.data.frame(event_study_full)
```

```{r}

completion_lookup <- analysis_df %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, NLF_ID, CTL_BEGIN_NBR, CTL_END_NBR) %>%
  inner_join(
    projects_safety %>%
      select(NLF_ID, CTL_BEGIN, CTL_END, completion_year) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = "NLF_ID",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
  filter(
    CTL_BEGIN_NBR <= CTL_END,   # segment start <= project end
    CTL_END_NBR   >= CTL_BEGIN  # segment end >= project start
  ) %>%
  group_by(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
  summarise(comp_year = min(completion_year, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

# Recompute event time
segment_year_data_full <- segment_year_data_full %>%
  left_join(completion_lookup, by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID") %>%
  mutate(event_time_full = CRASH_YR - comp_year)

# Rebuild event study with 2022 included
event_study_full <- segment_year_data_full %>%
  filter(
    treated_safety == TRUE,
    !is.na(event_time_full),
    event_time_full >= -2, event_time_full <= 2
  ) %>%
  group_by(event_time_full) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_crash_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
    se             = sd(crash_rate_MVMT,   na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
    n_obs          = n(),
    .groups        = "drop"
  )

cat("=== Event Study WITH 2022 ===\n")
as.data.frame(event_study_full)

cat("\n=== Original Event Study (without 2022) ===\n")
data.frame(
  event_time     = c(-2, -1, 0, 1, 2),
  avg_crash_rate = c(8.10, 7.64, 6.74, 6.80, 7.42)
)
```

```{r}
#####################
### Testing Clusters
#####################

# Step 1 — create balanced_segments_nlf
balanced_segments_nlf <- balanced_segments %>%
  left_join(
    analysis_df %>%
      st_drop_geometry() %>%
      select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, NLF_ID, COUNTY_CD.x),
    by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID"
  )

# Step 2 — all three models
did_segment <- felm(log_crash_rate ~ treated_safety * I(period == "after") |
                      ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID + CRASH_YR | 0 |
                      ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID,
                    data = balanced_segments_nlf %>%
                      filter(is.finite(log_crash_rate)))

did_nlf <- felm(log_crash_rate ~ treated_safety * I(period == "after") |
                  ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID + CRASH_YR | 0 |
                  NLF_ID,
                data = balanced_segments_nlf %>%
                  filter(is.finite(log_crash_rate)))

did_county <- felm(log_crash_rate ~ treated_safety * I(period == "after") |
                     ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID + CRASH_YR | 0 |
                     COUNTY_CD.x,
                   data = balanced_segments_nlf %>%
                     filter(is.finite(log_crash_rate)))

# Step 3 — compare
data.frame(
  clustering = c("Segment", "NLF_ID", "County"),
  estimate   = c(
    coef(did_segment)["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"],
    coef(did_nlf)["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"],
    coef(did_county)["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"]
  ),
  se         = c(
    did_segment$cse["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"],
    did_nlf$cse["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"],
    did_county$cse["treated_safetyTRUE:I(period == \"after\")TRUE"]
  )
) %>%
  mutate(p_value = round(2 * pnorm(-abs(estimate / se)), 3))
```

```{r}

# Rebuild treated_flag
treated_flag <- segment_year_data %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, treated_safety)

# Rebuild analysis_app
analysis_app <- analysis_df %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(
    ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, NLF_ID, COUNTY_CD.x,
    FUNCTION_CLASS_CD, ADT_TOTAL_NBR, SPEED_LIMIT_NBR,
    SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR, LANES_NBR, PCR_NBR, AVG_IRI,
    total_crashes, fatal_crashes, injury_crashes,
    crashes_per_MVMT, treated
  ) %>%
  left_join(treated_flag, by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID")

# Rebuild segment_year_app
segment_year_app <- segment_year_data %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  select(
    ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, CRASH_YR, period,
    yearly_crashes, yearly_fatal, yearly_injury,
    crash_rate_MVMT, treated_safety, completion_year,
    ADT_TOTAL_NBR, SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR, MVMT
  )

# Rebuild projects_app
projects_app <- projects_safety %>%
  select(
    NLF_ID, CTL_BEGIN, CTL_END, completion_year,
    PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST,
    PROJECT_NME, COUNTY_NME, DISTRICT_NBR,
    SAFETY_FUNDS_IND
  ) %>%
  distinct()

# Rebuild county_summary
county_summary <- analysis_app %>%
  left_join(
    projects_app %>%
      select(NLF_ID, EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST) %>%
      group_by(NLF_ID) %>%
      summarise(total_cost = sum(EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST,
                                 na.rm = TRUE),
                .groups = "drop"),
    by = "NLF_ID"
  ) %>%
  group_by(COUNTY_CD.x, FUNCTION_CLASS_CD) %>%
  summarise(
    n_segments       = n(),
    n_treated        = sum(treated_safety, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_crashes    = sum(total_crashes, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_fatalities = sum(fatal_crashes, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_crash_rate   = mean(crashes_per_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_funding    = sum(total_cost, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups          = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(COUNTY_CD.x) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_funding    = round(100 * total_funding /
                             sum(total_funding, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    pct_fatalities = round(100 * total_fatalities /
                             sum(total_fatalities, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    pct_segments   = round(100 * n_treated / n_segments, 1)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# Save everything
saveRDS(analysis_app,     "app_data/analysis_app.rds")
saveRDS(segment_year_app, "app_data/segment_year_app.rds")
saveRDS(projects_app,     "app_data/projects_app.rds")
saveRDS(county_summary,   "app_data/county_summary.rds")

message("All app data saved successfully")
```

### Making the App

```{r}
# Create app folder structure
dir.create("odot_app", showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("odot_app/app_data", showWarnings = FALSE)

# Copy all data files into app folder
file.copy(list.files("app_data", full.names = TRUE),
          "odot_app/app_data/",
          overwrite = TRUE)

message("App data copied to odot_app/app_data/")

```

Current issues:

not displaying the right info for the projects - fixed

can't see if there is a certain type of project for a county before selecting it - fixed

needs an option for all counties - fixed

map controls don't seem to work and counties are not very clear (map kinda sucks in its current form...) - just decided to nuke it

need to make the county dashboard display on the page better - I understand the problem

need road names with the segment, or some way to view the segments on a map - yes kinda fixed\

move the map for the risk explorer to right under the filter section

the ADT sort is not working right.

remove really short segments with ungodly high crash rates from the risk analysis tab? maybe make a box you can check to turn them on or off.

find a substitution for the overview map only if it can add a level of significant important or be interesting/cool.

get started on presentation. build a background, show results, create a story, and use the app to demonstrate it's use.

```{r}

```

```{r}
############################################
### ODOT Safety Investment Analyzer
### Shiny App — app.R
############################################

library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(leaflet)
library(patchwork)
library(scales)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)

# ── Load data ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
analysis_app             <- readRDS("app_data/analysis_app.rds")
segment_year_app         <- readRDS("app_data/segment_year_app.rds")
projects_app             <- readRDS("app_data/projects_app.rds")
county_summary           <- readRDS("app_data/county_summary.rds")
segments_geo             <- readRDS("app_data/segments_geo.rds")
project_segment_lookup   <- readRDS("app_data/project_segment_lookup.rds")

# ── County name lookup ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
county_name_lookup <- analysis_app %>%
  left_join(
    projects_app %>%
      select(COUNTY_NME) %>%
      distinct() %>%
      mutate(COUNTY_CD.x = toupper(substr(COUNTY_NME, 1, 3))),
    by = "COUNTY_CD.x"
  ) %>%
  distinct(COUNTY_CD.x, COUNTY_NME) %>%
  filter(!is.na(COUNTY_NME)) %>%
  mutate(display = paste0(COUNTY_CD.x, " — ", COUNTY_NME)) %>%
  arrange(COUNTY_CD.x)

county_choices <- setNames(
  c("ALL", county_name_lookup$COUNTY_CD.x),
  c("Statewide — All Ohio", county_name_lookup$display)
)

# ── Constants ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
COL_ORANGE <- "#f0883e"
COL_BLUE   <- "#58a6ff"
COL_GREEN  <- "#3fb950"
COL_RED    <- "#f85149"
COL_YELLOW <- "#d29922"
COL_MUTED  <- "#8b949e"

##county_choices <- sort(unique(analysis_app$COUNTY_CD.x))

fc_labels <- c(
  "1" = "FC1: Interstate",
  "2" = "FC2: Freeway",
  "3" = "FC3: Major Arterial",
  "4" = "FC4: Minor Arterial",
  "5" = "FC5: Collector",
  "6" = "FC6: Minor Collector",
  "7" = "FC7: Local"
)

theme_odot <- function(base_size = 16) {
  theme_minimal(base_size = base_size) +
    theme(
      plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "#F0F4F8", color = NA),
      panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "#FFFFFF", color = NA),
      panel.grid.major  = element_line(color = "#D1DCE8", linewidth = 0.4),
      panel.grid.minor  = element_blank(),
      text              = element_text(color = "#0D1B2A", size = base_size),
      axis.text         = element_text(color = "#1A2E45", size = base_size - 2),
      axis.title        = element_text(color = "#1A2E45", size = base_size - 1),
      plot.title        = element_text(color = "#0D1B2A", face = "bold",
                                       size = base_size + 4),
      plot.subtitle     = element_text(color = "#1A2E45", size = base_size),
      plot.caption      = element_text(color = "#7A9BB5", size = base_size - 3),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "#F0F4F8", color = NA),
      legend.text       = element_text(color = "#1A2E45", size = base_size - 2),
      legend.title      = element_text(color = "#1A2E45", size = base_size - 1),
      strip.text        = element_text(color = "#0D1B2A", size = base_size - 1)
    )
}

# ── Pre-build road name lookup from analysis_app ──────────────────────────────
road_name_lookup <- analysis_app %>%
  select(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, NLF_ID) %>%
  left_join(
    projects_app %>%
      select(NLF_ID, PROJECT_NME) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = "NLF_ID"
  ) %>%
  distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, .keep_all = TRUE)

# ── Pre-build segment crash data lookup ───────────────────────────────────────
seg_crash_lookup <- segment_year_app %>%
  group_by(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
  summarise(
    before_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT[period == "before"], na.rm = TRUE),
    after_rate  = mean(crash_rate_MVMT[period == "after"],  na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups     = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(has_data = !is.na(before_rate) | !is.na(after_rate))

############################################
### UI
############################################

ui <- dashboardPage(
  skin = "black",

  dashboardHeader(title = "ODOT Safety Analyzer"),

  dashboardSidebar(
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("County Dashboard",  tabName = "county",  icon = icon("chart-bar")),
      menuItem("Project Evaluator", tabName = "project", icon = icon("search")),
      menuItem("Risk Explorer",     tabName = "risk",    icon = icon("exclamation-triangle")),
      menuItem("Funding Gap", tabName = "funding", icon = icon("chart-pie")),
      menuItem("Cost Effectiveness", tabName = "cost", icon = icon("dollar-sign")),
      menuItem("Methodology",       tabName = "methods", icon = icon("info-circle"))
    )
  ),

  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(
      tags$style(HTML("
        .content-wrapper, .main-sidebar, .main-header .logo,
        .main-header .navbar { background-color: #0d1117 !important; }
        .skin-black .main-sidebar { background-color: #161b22 !important; }
        .skin-black .sidebar-menu > li.active > a,
        .skin-black .sidebar-menu > li:hover > a {
          border-left-color: #58a6ff !important; }
        .box { background: #161b22 !important;
               border-top-color: #58a6ff !important; }
        .box-header { color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        body { background-color: #0d1117 !important;
               color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        .selectize-input, .selectize-dropdown {
          background: #1c2128 !important;
          color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        table.dataTable thead th { color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        table.dataTable tbody td { color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        table.dataTable tbody tr { background-color: #161b22 !important; }
        table.dataTable tbody tr.odd  { background-color: #1c2128 !important; }
        table.dataTable tbody tr.even { background-color: #161b22 !important; }
        .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_length label,
        .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter label,
        .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_info { color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        .dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_paginate .paginate_button {
          color: #e6edf3 !important; }
        .small-box { border-radius: 6px !important; }
        .value-box-text { font-size: 13px !important; }
      "))
    ),

    tabItems(

      # ── Tab 1: County Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem(tabName = "county",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, title = "Select County",
            selectInput("county_select", "County:",
            choices  = county_choices,
            selected = "ALL"),
            hr(),
            valueBoxOutput("vbox_segments",   width = 12),
            valueBoxOutput("vbox_fatalities",  width = 12),
            valueBoxOutput("vbox_treated",     width = 12),
            hr(),
            p("Color guide:", style = "color:#8b949e; margin-bottom:4px;"),
            p("🔵 Interstate / Freeway", style = "color:#58a6ff; font-size:16px; margin:2px;"),
            p("🟡 Major Arterial",       style = "color:#d29922; font-size:16px; margin:2px;"),
            p("🔴 Minor Art. / Collector", style = "color:#f85149; font-size:16px; margin:2px;"),
            p("🟠 Minor Col. / Local",   style = "color:#f0883e; font-size:16px; margin:2px;")
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = textOutput("county_dashboard_title"),
            fluidRow(
              column(6, plotOutput("p_bar",     height = "380px")),
              column(6, plotOutput("p_fatal",   height = "380px"))
            ),
            fluidRow(
              column(6, plotOutput("p_funding", height = "380px")),
              column(6, plotOutput("p_bubble",  height = "380px"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),

      # ── Tab 2: Project Evaluator ───────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem(tabName = "project",
  fluidRow(
    box(width = 3, title = "Select Project",
      radioButtons("proj_view", "View Mode:",
                   choices  = c("Individual Project" = "individual",
                                "Project Type Trend" = "aggregate"),
                   selected = "individual"),
      hr(),
      selectInput("proj_scope", "Geography:",
                  choices  = c("Statewide", "By County"),
                  selected = "Statewide"),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.proj_scope == 'By County'",
        selectInput("proj_county", "County:",
                    choices  = county_choices,
                    selected = "HAM")
      ),
      uiOutput("proj_category_ui"),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.proj_view == 'individual'",
        uiOutput("proj_name_ui")
      ),
      hr(),
      verbatimTextOutput("proj_details")
    ),
    box(width = 9, title = "Project Analysis",
      plotOutput("project_plot", height = "700px")
    )
  )
),

      # ── Tab 3: Risk Explorer ───────────────────────────────────────────────
       tabItem(tabName = "risk",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, title = "Filters",
            selectInput("risk_county", "County:",
                        choices  = county_choices,
                        selected = "HAM"),
            selectInput("risk_fc", "Road Class:",
                        choices  = c("All", names(fc_labels)),
                        selected = "All"),
            sliderInput("risk_n", "Show top N segments:",
                        min = 10, max = 100, value = 25, step = 5),
            hr(),
            sliderInput("risk_min_length",
                        "Minimum segment length (miles):",
                        min = 0, max = 2, value = 0.1,
                        step = 0.05),
            checkboxInput("risk_exclude_short",
                          "Exclude very short segments (< min length)",
                          value = TRUE),
            hr(),
            p("Click any row to see segment on map.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:16px;"),
            leafletOutput("risk_map", height = "280px")
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = "Highest Risk Untreated Segments",
            DTOutput("risk_table")
          )
        )
      ),

      # ── Tab 4: Funding Gap ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem(tabName = "funding",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, title = "Filters",
            selectInput("fund_scope", "View:",
                        choices  = c("Statewide", "By County"),
                        selected = "Statewide"),
            conditionalPanel(
              condition = "input.fund_scope == 'By County'",
              selectInput("fund_county", "County:",
                          choices  = county_choices,
                          selected = "HAM")
            ),
            selectInput("fund_metric", "X Axis Metric:",
                        choices = c(
                          "% of Funding"          = "pct_funding",
                          "% of Segments Treated" = "pct_segments"
                        ))
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = "Investment Gap Analysis",
            plotOutput("funding_plot", height = "700px")
          )
        )
      ),


     # ── Tab 5: Cost Effectiveness ──────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem(tabName = "cost",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 3, title = "Filters",
            selectInput("cost_scope", "Geography:",
                        choices  = c("Statewide", "By County"),
                        selected = "Statewide"),
            conditionalPanel(
              condition = "input.cost_scope == 'By County'",
              selectInput("cost_county", "County:",
                          choices  = county_choices,
                          selected = "HAM")
            ),
            selectInput("cost_fc", "Road Class:",
                        choices = c("All", names(fc_labels)),
                        selected = "All"),
            hr(),
            p("Each bubble is one project.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:14px;"),
            p("X axis: total project cost.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:14px;"),
            p("Y axis: avg crash rate change after completion.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:14px;"),
            p("Bubble size: number of matched segments.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:14px;"),
            hr(),
            p("🟢 Meaningful improvement (> -0.5)",
              style = "color:#3fb950; font-size:14px;"),
            p("🔴 Meaningful worsening (> +0.5)",
              style = "color:#f85149; font-size:14px;"),
            p("⚫ Negligible change (within ±0.5)",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-size:14px;")
          ),
          box(width = 9, title = "Cost vs Effectiveness",
            plotOutput("cost_plot", height = "650px")
          )
        )
      ),


      # ── Tab 6: Methodology ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
      tabItem(tabName = "methods",
        fluidRow(
          box(width = 12, title = "About This Analysis",
            h4("Data Sources", style = "color:#58a6ff"),
            p("This tool combines four ODOT datasets spanning 2020–2024:"),
            tags$ul(
              tags$li("Crash Records — ~910,000 events spatially joined to road segments"),
              tags$li("Road Inventory — 328,709 segments with physical characteristics"),
              tags$li("Pavement Condition (PCR) — most recent inspection per segment"),
              tags$li("Construction Projects — 13,550 safety-funded projects")
            ),
            hr(),
            h4("Analytical Approach", style = "color:#58a6ff"),
            p("The core analysis uses a difference-in-differences (DiD) design,
              comparing crash rate changes on safety-funded segments to comparable
              untreated segments over the same period. Treatment and control roads
              are matched by ADT range (10th–90th percentile of treated segments).
              Models include segment and year fixed effects with standard errors
              clustered at the segment level."),
            hr(),
            h4("Key Finding", style = "color:#58a6ff"),
            p("Safety-funded projects show no statistically significant overall
              crash reduction (DiD coefficient: +0.014, p = 0.185). Intersection
              improvements are the one project type showing consistent crash
              reductions (~6.5 crashes per MVMT). Local and collector roads
              account for over 50% of Ohio fatalities but receive less than 15%
              of safety funding."),
            hr(),
            p("Developed by Xavier University Senior Capstone, 2025–2026.",
              style = "color:#8b949e; font-style:italic")
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

############################################
### SERVER
############################################

server <- function(input, output, session) {

  # ── Tab 1: County Dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   county_data <- reactive({
    if (input$county_select == "ALL") {
      county_summary %>%
        group_by(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD) %>%
        summarise(
          n_segments       = sum(n_segments),
          n_treated        = sum(n_treated),
          total_crashes    = sum(total_crashes),
          total_fatalities = sum(total_fatalities),
          avg_crash_rate   = mean(avg_crash_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
          total_funding    = sum(total_funding),
          .groups          = "drop"
        ) %>%
        mutate(
          pct_fatalities = round(100 * total_fatalities /
                                   sum(total_fatalities), 1),
          pct_funding    = round(100 * total_funding /
                                   sum(total_funding), 1),
          pct_segments   = round(100 * n_treated / n_segments, 1),
          COUNTY_CD.x    = "ALL",
          fc_label       = fc_labels[as.character(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD)],
          bar_color      = case_when(
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(1, 2) ~ COL_BLUE,
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD == 3          ~ COL_YELLOW,
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(4, 5) ~ COL_RED,
            TRUE                            ~ COL_ORANGE
          )
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(fc_label))
    } else {
      county_summary %>%
        filter(COUNTY_CD.x == input$county_select) %>%
        mutate(
          fc_label  = fc_labels[as.character(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD)],
          bar_color = case_when(
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(1, 2) ~ COL_BLUE,
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD == 3          ~ COL_YELLOW,
            FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(4, 5) ~ COL_RED,
            TRUE                            ~ COL_ORANGE
          )
        ) %>%
        filter(!is.na(fc_label))
    }
  })
   
    output$county_dashboard_title <- renderText({
    if (input$county_select == "ALL") {
      "Ohio Statewide — Safety Profile"
    } else {
      name <- county_name_lookup$COUNTY_NME[
        county_name_lookup$COUNTY_CD.x == input$county_select
      ]
      paste0(name, " County — Safety Profile")
    }
  })

  output$vbox_segments <- renderValueBox({
    d <- county_data()
    valueBox(
      value    = scales::comma(sum(d$n_segments)),
      subtitle = "Total Road Segments",
      icon     = icon("road"),
      color    = "blue",
      width    = 12
    )
  })

  output$vbox_fatalities <- renderValueBox({
    d <- county_data()
    valueBox(
      value    = scales::comma(sum(d$total_fatalities)),
      subtitle = "Fatalities 2020-2024",
      icon     = icon("exclamation-triangle"),
      color    = "red",
      width    = 12
    )
  })

  output$vbox_treated <- renderValueBox({
    d <- county_data()
    pct <- round(100 * sum(d$n_treated) / sum(d$n_segments), 1)
    valueBox(
      value    = paste0(pct, "%"),
      subtitle = "Segments w/ Investment",
      icon     = icon("wrench"),
      color    = "yellow",
      width    = 12
    )
  })

  # Individual plots for better layout control
  output$p_bar <- renderPlot({
    d <- county_data()
    req(nrow(d) > 0)
    ggplot(d, aes(x = reorder(fc_label, avg_crash_rate),
                  y = avg_crash_rate, fill = bar_color)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
      geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_crash_rate, 1)),
                hjust = -0.2, color = "#0d1117", size = 5.5) +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(d$avg_crash_rate) * 1.3)) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Crash Rate by Road Class",
           x = NULL, y = "Crashes per MVMT") +
      theme_odot()
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

  output$p_fatal <- renderPlot({
    d <- county_data()
    req(nrow(d) > 0)
    ggplot(d, aes(x = reorder(fc_label, pct_fatalities),
                  y = pct_fatalities, fill = bar_color)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
      geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_fatalities, 1), "%")),
                hjust = -0.2, color = "#0d1117", size = 5.5) +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(d$pct_fatalities) * 1.3)) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Share of Fatalities",
           x = NULL, y = "% of County Fatalities") +
      theme_odot()
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

  output$p_funding <- renderPlot({
    d <- county_data()
    req(nrow(d) > 0)
    ggplot(d, aes(x = reorder(fc_label, pct_funding),
                  y = pct_funding, fill = bar_color)) +
      geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.85) +
      geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(pct_funding, 1), "%")),
                hjust = -0.2, color = "#0d1117", size = 5.5) +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, max(d$pct_funding) * 1.3)) +
      coord_flip() +
      labs(title = "Share of Safety Funding",
           x = NULL, y = "% of Total Safety Funding") +
      theme_odot()
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

  output$p_bubble <- renderPlot({
    d <- county_data()
    req(nrow(d) > 0)
    ggplot(d, aes(x = pct_funding, y = avg_crash_rate,
                  size = pct_fatalities, fill = bar_color)) +
      geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.85,
                 color = "#0d1117", stroke = 1.5) +
      geom_text(aes(label = fc_label),
                vjust = -1.5, size = 5.0, color = "#0d1117") +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_size_continuous(range = c(4, 14), name = "% Fatalities") +
      scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
      labs(title    = "Investment Gap",
           subtitle = "Bubble = share of fatalities",
           x = "% of Safety Funding",
           y = "Crash Rate (per MVMT)") +
      theme_odot() +
      theme(legend.position = "none")
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

  # ── Tab 2: Project Evaluator ─────────────────────────────────────────────

  # Pre-computed project data availability
  proj_available <- reactive({
    if (input$proj_scope == "By County") {
      project_segment_lookup %>%
        filter(grepl(input$proj_county, COUNTY_NME, 
                     ignore.case = TRUE))
    } else {
      project_segment_lookup
    }
  })

  proj_filtered <- reactive({
    p <- proj_available()
    if (!is.null(input$proj_category) && 
        input$proj_category != "All") {
      p <- p %>% 
        filter(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY == input$proj_category)
    }
    p
  })

  output$proj_category_ui <- renderUI({
    base <- proj_available()

    counts <- base %>%
      group_by(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY) %>%
      summarise(
        n_projects = n_distinct(PROJECT_NME),
        n_segments = n(),
        .groups    = "drop"
      ) %>%
      arrange(desc(n_projects)) %>%
      mutate(label = paste0(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
                            " (", n_projects, " projects)"))

    total <- n_distinct(base$PROJECT_NME)

    choices <- c(
      setNames("All", paste0("All (", total, " projects)")),
      setNames(counts$PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, counts$label)
    )

    selectInput("proj_category", "Project Type:",
                choices  = choices,
                selected = "All")
  })

  output$proj_name_ui <- renderUI({
    choices <- sort(unique(proj_filtered()$PROJECT_NME))
    if (length(choices) == 0) return(NULL)
    selectInput("proj_name", "Project:", choices = choices)
  })

  output$proj_details <- renderText({
    if (input$proj_view == "aggregate") return("")
    req(input$proj_name)
    p <- proj_filtered() %>%
      filter(PROJECT_NME == input$proj_name) %>%
      slice(1)
    if (nrow(p) == 0) return("")
    n_segs <- proj_filtered() %>%
      filter(PROJECT_NME == input$proj_name) %>%
      nrow()
    paste0(
      "Category:   ", p$PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY, "\n",
      "Completion: ", p$completion_year, "\n",
      "County:     ", p$COUNTY_NME, "\n",
      "Est. Cost:  $", scales::comma(p$EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST), "\n",
      "Segments:   ", n_segs, " matched"
    )
  })

  output$project_plot <- renderPlot({

    # ── AGGREGATE MODE ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
     if (input$proj_view == "aggregate") {
      req(input$proj_category)
      if (is.null(input$proj_category)) return(NULL)

     # If All selected use all segments, otherwise filter by type
      if (input$proj_category == "All") {
        base_data <- proj_available()
        type_label <- "All Project Types Combined"
      } else {
        base_data <- proj_available() %>%
          filter(PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY == input$proj_category)
        type_label <- input$proj_category
      }

       # base_data already set above

      if (nrow(base_data) == 0) {
        return(
          ggplot() +
            annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                     label = paste0("No projects found for\n",
                                    input$proj_category,
                                    "\nin selected geography."),
                     color = COL_MUTED, size = 6,
                     hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
            theme_void() +
            theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117",
                                                 color = NA))
        )
      }

      agg_segs <- base_data %>%
        pull(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID) %>%
        unique()

      completion_lookup <- base_data %>%
        distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID, completion_year)

      agg_data <- segment_year_app %>%
        filter(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in% agg_segs) %>%
        select(-any_of("completion_year")) %>%
        left_join(completion_lookup, by = "ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID") %>%
        mutate(event_time = CRASH_YR - completion_year) %>%
        filter(event_time >= -2, event_time <= 2) %>%
        group_by(event_time) %>%
        summarise(
          avg_rate   = mean(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
          se         = sd(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(n()),
          n_segments = n_distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID),
          .groups    = "drop"
        )

      if (nrow(agg_data) == 0) {
        return(
          ggplot() +
            annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                     label = "No data available for this project type.",
                     color = COL_MUTED, size = 8,
                     hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
            theme_void() +
            theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117",
                                                 color = NA))
        )
      }

      before_avg <- mean(agg_data$avg_rate[agg_data$event_time < 0],
                         na.rm = TRUE)
      after_avg  <- mean(agg_data$avg_rate[agg_data$event_time >= 0],
                         na.rm = TRUE)
      chg        <- round(after_avg - before_avg, 2)
      chg_label  <- ifelse(chg < 0,
                           paste0("▼ ", abs(chg), " per MVMT"),
                           paste0("▲ ", abs(chg), " per MVMT"))
      chg_color  <- case_when(
  chg < -0.5  ~ COL_GREEN,   # meaningful improvement
  chg >  0.5  ~ COL_RED,     # meaningful worsening
  TRUE        ~ COL_MUTED    # negligible change — gray
)
line_color <- chg_color
          n_proj <- n_distinct(base_data$PROJECT_NME)
      scope_label <- if (input$proj_scope == "Statewide") {
        "Ohio Statewide"
      } else {
        paste0(input$proj_county, " County")
      }

      ggplot(agg_data, aes(x = event_time, y = avg_rate)) +
        geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = avg_rate - 1.96 * se,
                        ymax = avg_rate + 1.96 * se),
                    fill = line_color, alpha = 0.15) +
        geom_line(color = line_color, linewidth = 1.3) +
        geom_point(color = line_color, size = 4) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
                   color = COL_ORANGE, linewidth = 0.8) +
        annotate("text", x = 0.1,
                 y = max(agg_data$avg_rate +
                           1.96 * agg_data$se, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.97,
                 label = "Completion",
                 color = COL_ORANGE, hjust = 0, size = 5.5) +
        annotate("label",
                 x     = -1.5,
                 y     = max(agg_data$avg_rate +
                               1.96 * agg_data$se, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.6,
                 label = paste0(
                   "Before avg: ", round(before_avg, 1), "\n",
                   "After avg:  ", round(after_avg,  1), "\n",
                   "Change:     ", chg_label, "\n",
                   "Projects:   ", n_proj, "\n",
                   "Segments:   ", max(agg_data$n_segments)),
                 fill          = "#1c2128",
                 color         = chg_color,
                 size          = 5,
                 linewidth     = 0,
                 label.padding = unit(0.4, "lines"),
                 hjust         = 0) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = -2:2,
                           labels = c("-2", "-1", "0\n(Completion)",
                                      "+1", "+2")) +
        labs(
          title    = paste0(type_label, " — Aggregate Trend"),
        subtitle = paste0(scope_label,
                          " | 95% CI shown | n = ", n_proj,
                          " projects"),
          x        = "Years Relative to Completion",
          y        = "Avg Crash Rate (per MVMT)",
          caption  = "Source: ODOT Construction Projects & Crash Data 2020–2024"
        ) +
        theme_odot()

    # ── INDIVIDUAL MODE ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    } else {
      req(input$proj_name)

      proj_segs <- proj_filtered() %>%
        filter(PROJECT_NME == input$proj_name)

      if (nrow(proj_segs) == 0) {
        return(
          ggplot() +
            annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                     label = "No data available for this project.",
                     color = COL_MUTED, size = 8,
                     hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
            theme_void() +
            theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117",
                                                 color = NA))
        )
      }

      seg_ids   <- proj_segs$ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID
      proj_info <- proj_segs %>% slice(1)
      comp_year <- proj_info$completion_year

      plot_data <- segment_year_app %>%
        filter(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID %in% seg_ids) %>%
        group_by(CRASH_YR) %>%
        summarise(
          avg_rate = mean(crash_rate_MVMT, na.rm = TRUE),
          n_segs   = n_distinct(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID),
          .groups  = "drop"
        )

      if (nrow(plot_data) == 0 || all(is.na(plot_data$avg_rate))) {
        return(
          ggplot() +
            annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                     label = paste0("No crash data found for\n",
                                    input$proj_name),
                     color = COL_MUTED, size = 8,
                     hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
            theme_void() +
            theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117",
                                                 color = NA))
        )
      }

      avg_before <- mean(proj_segs$before_rate, na.rm = TRUE)
      avg_after  <- mean(proj_segs$after_rate,  na.rm = TRUE)
      chg        <- round(avg_after - avg_before, 2)
      chg_label  <- ifelse(chg < 0,
                           paste0("▼ ", abs(chg), " per MVMT"),
                           paste0("▲ ", abs(chg), " per MVMT"))
      chg_color  <- case_when(
  chg < -0.5  ~ COL_GREEN,   # meaningful improvement
  chg >  0.5  ~ COL_RED,     # meaningful worsening
  TRUE        ~ COL_MUTED    # negligible change — gray
)
line_color <- chg_color

      ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = CRASH_YR, y = avg_rate)) +
        geom_area(fill = line_color, alpha = 0.1) +
        geom_line(color = line_color, linewidth = 1.3) +
        geom_point(color = line_color, size = 4) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = comp_year, linetype = "dashed",
                   color = COL_ORANGE, linewidth = 0.8) +
        annotate("text",
                 x     = comp_year + 0.05,
                 y     = max(plot_data$avg_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.95,
                 label = paste0("Completed ", comp_year),
                 color = COL_ORANGE, hjust = 0, size = 5.5) +
        annotate("label",
                 x     = mean(range(plot_data$CRASH_YR)),
                 y     = max(plot_data$avg_rate, na.rm = TRUE) * 0.5,
                 label = paste0(
                   "Before: ", round(avg_before, 1), "\n",
                   "After:  ", round(avg_after,  1), "\n",
                   "Change: ", chg_label, "\n",
                   "Segments: ", nrow(proj_segs)),
                 fill          = "#1c2128",
                 color         = chg_color,
                 size          = 5,
                 linewidth     = 0,
                 label.padding = unit(0.4, "lines")) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = unique(plot_data$CRASH_YR)) +
        labs(
          title    = input$proj_name,
          subtitle = paste0(proj_info$PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
                            " | ", proj_info$COUNTY_NME, " County",
                            " | Cost: $",
                            scales::comma(proj_info$EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST)),
          x        = "Year",
          y        = "Avg Crash Rate (per MVMT)"
        ) +
        theme_odot()
    }
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

  # ── Tab 3: Risk Explorer ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  risk_data <- reactive({
    d <- analysis_app %>%
      filter(COUNTY_CD.x == input$risk_county,
             treated_safety == FALSE,
             !is.na(crashes_per_MVMT),
             ADT_TOTAL_NBR > 0)

    # Filter out very short segments if checkbox is checked
    if (input$risk_exclude_short) {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR >= input$risk_min_length)
    }

    if (input$risk_fc != "All") {
      d <- d %>%
        filter(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD == as.integer(input$risk_fc))
    }

    d %>%
      arrange(desc(crashes_per_MVMT)) %>%
      slice_head(n = input$risk_n) %>%
      mutate(
        fc_label      = fc_labels[as.character(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD)],
        crash_rate    = round(crashes_per_MVMT, 1),
        ADT_num       = ADT_TOTAL_NBR,  # keep numeric for sorting
        ADT           = scales::comma(ADT_TOTAL_NBR),
        length_mi     = round(SEGMENT_LENGTH_NBR, 3)
      ) %>%
      select(
        `Segment ID`  = ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID,
        `Road/Route`  = NLF_ID,
        `Road Class`  = fc_label,
        `Crash Rate`  = crash_rate,
        `Fatalities`  = fatal_crashes,
        `ADT`         = ADT,
        `ADT_sort`    = ADT_num,       # hidden sort column
        `Length (mi)` = length_mi,
        `PCR Score`   = PCR_NBR
      )
  })

  output$risk_table <- renderDT({
    d <- risk_data()
    
    # Separate display and sort columns
    display_cols <- c("Segment ID", "Road/Route", "Road Class",
                      "Crash Rate", "Fatalities", "ADT",
                      "Length (mi)", "PCR Score")
    
    datatable(
      d,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 25,
        dom        = "frtip",
        scrollX    = TRUE,
        columnDefs = list(
          list(visible = FALSE, targets = 6),  # hide ADT_sort
          list(orderData = 6, targets = 5)     # sort ADT by ADT_sort
        )
      ),
      rownames  = FALSE,
      style     = "bootstrap",
      selection = "single",
      colnames  = c("Segment ID", "Road/Route", "Road Class",
                    "Crash Rate", "Fatalities", "ADT",
                    "ADT_sort", "Length (mi)", "PCR Score")
    ) %>%
      formatStyle(
        columns    = display_cols,
        color      = "#e6edf3",
        background = "#161b22"
      )
  })

  # Map under filters
  output$risk_map <- renderLeaflet({
    leaflet() %>%
      addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.DarkMatter) %>%
      setView(lng = -82.9, lat = 40.4, zoom = 9)
  })

  observeEvent(input$risk_table_rows_selected, {
    row <- input$risk_table_rows_selected
    req(row)

    selected_seg <- risk_data()[row, ]$`Segment ID`

    seg_geo <- segments_geo %>%
      filter(ROADWAY_INVENTORY_ID == selected_seg) %>%
      st_transform(4326)

    if (nrow(seg_geo) > 0) {
      center <- seg_geo %>%
        st_centroid() %>%
        st_coordinates()

      leafletProxy("risk_map") %>%
        clearShapes() %>%
        addPolylines(
          data   = seg_geo,
          color  = COL_RED,
          weight = 5,
          label  = paste0(
            "Segment: ", selected_seg, "\n",
            "Route: ", risk_data()[row, ]$`Road/Route`
          )
        ) %>%
        setView(lng = center[1], lat = center[2], zoom = 14)
    }
  })

  # ── Tab 4: Funding Gap ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$funding_plot <- renderPlot({
    if (input$fund_scope == "By County") {
      d <- county_summary %>%
        filter(COUNTY_CD.x == input$fund_county)
    } else {
      d <- county_summary %>%
        group_by(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD) %>%
        summarise(
          n_segments       = sum(n_segments),
          n_treated        = sum(n_treated),
          total_crashes    = sum(total_crashes),
          total_fatalities = sum(total_fatalities),
          avg_crash_rate   = mean(avg_crash_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
          total_funding    = sum(total_funding),
          .groups          = "drop"
        ) %>%
        mutate(
          pct_funding    = round(100 * total_funding /
                                   sum(total_funding), 1),
          pct_fatalities = round(100 * total_fatalities /
                                   sum(total_fatalities), 1),
          pct_segments   = round(100 * n_treated / n_segments, 1),
          COUNTY_CD.x    = "Statewide"
        )
    }

    d <- d %>%
      mutate(
        fc_label  = fc_labels[as.character(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD)],
        bar_color = case_when(
          FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(1, 2) ~ COL_BLUE,
          FUNCTION_CLASS_CD == 3          ~ COL_YELLOW,
          FUNCTION_CLASS_CD %in% c(4, 5) ~ COL_RED,
          TRUE                            ~ COL_ORANGE
        ),
        x_var = if (input$fund_metric == "pct_funding")
          pct_funding else pct_segments
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(fc_label))

    ggplot(d, aes(x = x_var, y = avg_crash_rate,
                  size = pct_fatalities, fill = bar_color)) +
      geom_point(shape = 21, alpha = 0.85,
                 color = "#0d1117", stroke = 1.5) +
      geom_text(aes(label = fc_label),
                vjust = -1.5, size = 5.5, color = "#0d1117") +
      scale_fill_identity() +
      scale_size_continuous(range = c(5, 20),
                            name  = "% of Fatalities") +
      scale_x_continuous(
        labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 1)) +
      labs(
        title    = "Safety Investment Gap by Road Class",
        subtitle = "Bubble size = share of fatalities",
        x        = ifelse(input$fund_metric == "pct_funding",
                          "% of Total Safety Funding",
                          "% of Segments Receiving Investment"),
        y        = "Avg Crash Rate (per MVMT)",
        caption  = "Source: ODOT Construction Projects & Crash Data 2020–2024"
      ) +
      theme_odot()
  }, bg = "#0d1117")
  
  # ── Tab 5: Cost Effectiveness ────────────────────────────────────────────
  output$cost_plot <- renderPlot({

    # Build project-level summary from lookup
    cost_data <- project_segment_lookup %>%
      group_by(PROJECT_NME, PRIMARY_WORK_CATEGORY,
               COUNTY_NME, COUNTY_CD.x, completion_year,
               EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST) %>%
      summarise(
        avg_change  = mean(change, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_segments  = n(),
        avg_before  = mean(before_rate, na.rm = TRUE),
        avg_fc      = round(mean(FUNCTION_CLASS_CD, na.rm = TRUE)),
        .groups     = "drop"
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST),
             EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST > 0,
             !is.na(avg_change))

    # Apply geography filter
    if (input$cost_scope == "By County") {
      cost_data <- cost_data %>%
        filter(grepl(input$cost_county, COUNTY_NME,
                     ignore.case = TRUE))
    }

    # Apply FC filter
    if (input$cost_fc != "All") {
      cost_data <- cost_data %>%
        filter(avg_fc == as.integer(input$cost_fc))
    }

    if (nrow(cost_data) == 0) {
      return(
        ggplot() +
          annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
                   label = "No projects found for selected filters.",
                   color = COL_MUTED, size = 8,
                   hjust = 0.5, vjust = 0.5) +
          theme_void() +
          theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "#0d1117",
                                               color = NA))
      )
    }

    # Color by outcome
    cost_data <- cost_data %>%
      mutate(
        outcome = case_when(
          avg_change < -0.5 ~ "Improved",
          avg_change >  0.5 ~ "Worsened",
          TRUE              ~ "No Change"
        ),
        dot_color = case_when(
          avg_change < -0.5 ~ COL_GREEN,
          avg_change >  0.5 ~ COL_RED,
          TRUE              ~ COL_MUTED
        ),
        cost_millions = EST_TOTAL_CONSTR_COST / 1e6
      )

    # Horizontal reference line
    ref_y <- 0

    # Label only the most extreme projects
    top_improved <- cost_data %>%
      slice_min(avg_change, n = 3)
    top_worsened <- cost_data %>%
      slice_max(avg_change, n = 3)
    top_costly   <- cost_data %>%
      slice_max(cost_millions, n = 2)

    label_data <- bind_rows(
      top_improved, top_worsened, top_costly
    ) %>% distinct(PROJECT_NME, .keep_all = TRUE)

    ggplot(cost_data, aes(x = cost_millions,
                          y = avg_change)) +
      # Reference line at zero
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed",
                 color = COL_MUTED, linewidth = 0.6) +
      geom_hline(yintercept =  0.5, linetype = "dotted",
                 color = COL_RED, linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.5) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = -0.5, linetype = "dotted",
                 color = COL_GREEN, linewidth = 0.4, alpha = 0.5) +
      # Shaded regions
      annotate("rect",
               xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               ymin = -Inf, ymax = -0.5,
               fill = COL_GREEN, alpha = 0.04) +
      annotate("rect",
               xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf,
               ymin = 0.5, ymax = Inf,
               fill = COL_RED, alpha = 0.04) +
      # Points
      geom_point(aes(size = n_segments, color = dot_color),
                 alpha = 0.75) +
      scale_color_identity() +
      # Labels for extreme projects
      geom_text(data = label_data,
                aes(label = PROJECT_NME),
                color    = "#0d1117",
                size     = 3.5,
                hjust    = -0.1,
                vjust    = 0.5,
                check_overlap = TRUE) +
      scale_size_continuous(range = c(3, 12),
                            name  = "Matched Segments") +
      scale_x_continuous(
        labels = scales::dollar_format(suffix = "M"),
        breaks = pretty(cost_data$cost_millions, n = 6)
      ) +
      # Region labels
      annotate("text",
               x     = max(cost_data$cost_millions) * 0.85,
               y     = min(cost_data$avg_change) * 0.85,
               label = "Effective",
               color = COL_GREEN, size = 5.5,
               fontface = "italic", alpha = 0.6) +
      annotate("text",
               x     = max(cost_data$cost_millions) * 0.85,
               y     = max(cost_data$avg_change) * 0.85,
               label = "Ineffective",
               color = COL_RED, size = 5.5,
               fontface = "italic", alpha = 0.6) +
      labs(
        title    = "Project Cost vs Safety Effectiveness",
        subtitle = paste0(
          if (input$cost_scope == "Statewide") "Ohio Statewide"
          else paste0(input$cost_county, " County"),
          " | Each point = one project | ",
          nrow(cost_data), " projects shown"
        ),
        x        = "Total Project Cost",
        y        = "Avg Crash Rate Change (per MVMT)",
        caption  = "Negative = crash rate decreased after completion | Source: ODOT 2020–2024"
      ) +
      theme_odot() +
      theme(legend.position = "right")
  }, bg = "#0d1117")

}

############################################
### RUN
############################################

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
